description: Gold layer configuration for gaps in care with foreign keys to dimension tables

gold_tables.sql_script: SELECT ch."EncounterICN" as gapsInCareID, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) * 100 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) as yearMonth, COALESCE(dm.memberKey, ch."HICNumber") as memberKey, ch."HICNumber" as planMemberID, 'DIABETES' as measureID, 'A1C' as subMeasureID, 'HEDIS_DIABETES_A1C' as measureCode, 'Diabetes A1C Control' as measureName, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM claim_lines cl WHERE cl."ClaimLineEncounterICN" = ch."EncounterICN" AND cl."ServiceLineProcedureCode" IN ('83036', '83037')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as numerCnt, 1 as denomCnt, 'A1C Test Required' as eventName, ch."MemberDOB" as dateOfService, COALESCE(dp.providerKey, ch."BillingProviderNPI") as providerKey, ch."BillingProviderNPI" as providerID, ch."BillingProviderLastOrOrg" as providerName, ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" as claimNumber, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as creationDateTime FROM claim_headers ch LEFT JOIN platinum_dimmember dm ON ch."HICNumber" = dm.planMemberID AND dm.isCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN platinum_dimprovider dp ON ch."BillingProviderNPI" = dp.npi AND dp.isCurrent = 1 WHERE ch."RecordType" = 'C' AND (ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" LIKE 'E11%' OR ch."Diag1" LIKE 'E11%' OR ch."Diag2" LIKE 'E11%')
